description: Style Note Coloured jeans from peter england provides you with unique styling and something new to suit your mood. Dress in these white jeans for a dashing casual look. Pair it with a dark coloured shirt for an evening out on the town.  Product Details White jeans, has low waist, buttoned and zippered closure, belt loops around the waist, brand patch on the waist at the back, two insert pockets in front with a coin pocket inside the right pocket and two patch pockets at the back with stitched detail  Material and Care 100% cotton Wash separately Do not bleach Drip dry  Warm iron Size and Fit Slim fit, Low waist The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32 Style NoteColoured jeans from Peter England provides you with unique styling and something new to suit your mood.
